title: GenAI Assistant for Product Information - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the GenAI writing assistant feature for Assistive Partners (APs) on the PwD Catalog Portal. This feature enables APs to generate accessibility-compliant product information including Short Description, Detailed Description, Specifications, and ALT Text using an integrated AI assistant.

inScope: GenAI button visibility and access control
Input and context handling for content generation
Generated content quality and format validation

dependencies.blockedBy: SCRUM-41 - GenAI model for content generation

prerequisites: Valid AP account with approved status

testCases.title: Verify GenAI button visibility on Short Description field
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, navigated to Product Upload form
steps: Verify 'Assist with GenAI' button/icon is visible next to the field
expectedResults: GenAI assist button/icon is displayed next to Short Description field
testCases.postconditions: GenAI button is accessible for interaction

testCases.title: Verify GenAI button visibility on Detailed Description field
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, navigated to Product Upload form
steps: Verify 'Assist with GenAI' button/icon is visible next to the field
expectedResults: GenAI assist button/icon is displayed next to Detailed Description field
testCases.postconditions: GenAI button is accessible for interaction

testCases.title: Verify GenAI button visibility on Specifications field
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, navigated to Product Upload form
steps: Verify 'Assist with GenAI' button/icon is visible next to the field
expectedResults: GenAI assist button/icon is displayed next to Specifications field
testCases.postconditions: GenAI button is accessible for interaction

testCases.title: Verify GenAI button is hidden for non-logged-in users
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in
steps: Open the application without logging in
Attempt to access Product Upload page directly via URL
Verify access is denied or redirected to login
expectedResults: User is redirected to login page or access denied message shown
GenAI buttons are not accessible to unauthenticated users
testCases.postconditions: User remains unauthenticated

testCases.title: Generate Short Description with minimal product inputs
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Input and Context, AC3 - Generated Content
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, on Product Upload form
steps: Click 'Assist with GenAI' button next to Short Description
Wait for GenAI panel/popup to appear
Verify generated Short Description is displayed
expectedResults: Short Description is generated within 150-200 characters
Generated text is clear and accessibility-friendly
testCases.postconditions: Generated Short Description is available for review

testCases.title: Generate Detailed Description with product context
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Input and Context, AC3 - Generated Content
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, on Product Upload form
steps: Enter Key Features: 'voice output, keyboard navigation, multi-language support'
Click 'Assist with GenAI' button next to Detailed Description
Wait for GenAI to generate content
testCases.postconditions: Detailed Description is generated and ready for review

testCases.title: Verify Short Description character limit (150-200 chars)
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Open GenAI assistant for Short Description
expectedResults: Content is suitable for catalog cards
testCases.postconditions: Short Description meets character requirements

testCases.title: Verify generated content avoids jargon and ambiguous terms
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Generated Content, AC5 - Accessibility Compliance
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Generate content for multiple product types
Check for terms like 'normal', 'abnormal', medical jargon
expectedResults: Content is generated for all fields
No jargon or technical slang used
testCases.postconditions: All generated content is accessibility-compliant

testCases.title: Edit GenAI-generated text before submission
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
expectedResults: Modified content is displayed in the field
testCases.postconditions: Edited content is saved in draft state

testCases.title: Regenerate content using 'Regenerate' button
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
steps: Wait for new content to be generated
expectedResults: Regenerate button is visible and clickable
New content differs from previous generation
testCases.postconditions: New generated content is available for review

testCases.title: Accept generated content using 'Accept' button
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - Editing and Customization, AC7 - Integration and Experience
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
steps: Verify content is inserted into the input field
expectedResults: Accept button is visible and clickable
Content is inserted directly into Short Description field
testCases.postconditions: Accepted content is in the form field

testCases.title: Verify AI-generated content disclaimer is displayed
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI panel is open
steps: Look for disclaimer text below the GenAI section
expectedResults: Disclaimer is visible below GenAI section
testCases.postconditions: User is informed about AI-generated nature of content

testCases.title: Verify AP can discard GenAI-generated text
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
steps: Verify content is not inserted into the field
testCases.postconditions: No AI content is inserted, field remains as before

testCases.title: Verify GenAI panel appears as right-side panel or popup
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, on Product Upload form
steps: Click 'Assist with GenAI' button on any field
Verify it appears as right-side panel or popup
expectedResults: Interface is a right-side panel or popup
Does not obstruct the main form completely
User can see both form and GenAI panel
testCases.postconditions: GenAI panel is properly positioned

testCases.title: Verify conversational refinement - 'make it simpler'
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
testCases.postconditions: Simplified content is available

testCases.title: Verify conversational refinement - 'add safety information'
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
steps: Generate Detailed Description for a medical device
expectedResults: Safety warnings are clear and visible
testCases.postconditions: Content with safety information is available

testCases.title: Verify GenAI handles empty/minimal input gracefully
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Open GenAI assistant without entering product details
expectedResults: Or generates generic content with warning
testCases.postconditions: System handles edge case gracefully

testCases.title: Verify GenAI handles special characters in input
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Enter product name with special characters: 'Braille Display™ (Model-X)'
expectedResults: Special characters are accepted in input
Special characters are preserved where appropriate
testCases.postconditions: Content with special characters is generated correctly

testCases.title: Verify GenAI handles very long input text
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Enter very long product name (500+ characters)
expectedResults: System accepts or truncates long input
Appropriate validation message if limit exceeded
User is informed of any limitations
testCases.postconditions: System handles long input appropriately

testCases.title: Verify GenAI service unavailable error handling
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI service is unavailable (simulated)
steps: Attempt to generate content when service is down
expectedResults: User can retry or continue manually
testCases.postconditions: User is informed of service issue

testCases.title: Verify multiple consecutive generations
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
testCases.postconditions: Multiple generations work correctly

testCases.title: Verify generated content avoids bias and discriminatory phrasing
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Generate content for various disability-related products
Review all generated content for bias
testCases.postconditions: Content is bias-free and inclusive

testCases.title: Verify GenAI panel keyboard accessibility
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Navigate to GenAI button using keyboard only
Navigate through panel options using Tab
testCases.postconditions: GenAI panel is fully keyboard accessible

testCases.title: Verify GenAI loading state indicator
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Observe loading state during content generation
expectedResults: User knows generation is in progress
testCases.postconditions: User experience is smooth with clear feedback

testCases.title: Verify GenAI works with multilingual product names
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP
steps: Enter product name in non-English language
expectedResults: Output is generated (in English or appropriate language)
testCases.postconditions: Multilingual support is verified

testCases.title: Verify complete rewrite of GenAI-generated text
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, GenAI has generated content
steps: Delete and write completely new text
testCases.postconditions: AP has full control over content

productData: Sample product names across categories (Mobility Aids, Hearing Devices, Vision Aids, Software)
Product images for ALT text testing

assumptions: GenAI service (Amazon Bedrock with Claude 3 Sonnet) is operational and accessible
AP accounts have been properly set up with appropriate permissions
Product Upload and Edit forms are functional
Network connectivity is stable for API calls
Test environment mirrors production GenAI configuration
openQuestions: What is the exact character limit validation for Short Description (150-200)?
Is there a rate limit for GenAI generations per session/user?
What languages are supported for tone guidance input?
How long is the session context stored before automatic cleanup?
What specific accessibility hints are configured in the system?
risks: GenAI service availability may affect test execution
Generated content quality may vary between test runs
Linked bug SCRUM-691 indicates existing GenAI generation failures
